title: rhus rigida var. dentata
intro: Rhus rigida var. dentata, also known as the prickly sumac, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its thorny branches and distinctive, compound leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rhus rigida var. dentata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, among others. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
